categorical_fail: ac_false_positive — model refused to assess any ACs and produced no verdict, meaning zero AC coverage and no process compliance; however no AC was falsely marked satisfied so the categorical fail is triggered by complete absence of assessment rather than a positive misclassification
notes: The model refused to perform the DoD assessment and instead requested missing artefacts, producing no AC coverage, no deviation detection, no NFR check, no metric signal step, and no verdict — a complete pipeline failure for every scored dimension.
